title: Basic CBC (BO) — 3 attributes, 4 versions
summary: Generate a balanced 12-task × 4-version CBC design over Brand, Pack, Price using minimum-overlap balance.
oce_text:
[["design-cbc::design-bo"]]
run_dir = "./runs/design-bo"
run_name = "pilot"

[design-cbc.design-bo.spec]
versions = 4
tasks_per_version = 12
concepts_per_task = 3

[[design-cbc.design-bo.spec.attributes]]
name = "Brand"
max_level = 3

[[design-cbc.design-bo.spec.attributes]]
name = "Pack"
max_level = 2

[[design-cbc.design-bo.spec.attributes]]
name = "Price"
max_level = 4

title: BO with pairwise restrictions and gating
summary: Forbid (Brand=0, Pack=2) and gate Color on Brand=2; multi-start search.
oce_text:
[["design-cbc::design-bo"]]
run_dir = "./runs/design-bo"
run_name = "restricted"
seed = 42
n_starts = 4
threads = 4
n_steps = 300000
